articles.title: Jewellery and antiques roadshow coming to Whitworth
articles.excerpt: A jewellery and antiques roadshow will visit The Ashcroft in Whitworth on Wednesday 15 July, offering same-day cash for unwanted valuables.
articles.summary: We Buy Vintage will hold a roadshow at The Ashcroft on Market Street, Whitworth, from 10am until 3pm on Wednesday 15 July 2026.
articles.content_html:
A jewellery and antiques roadshow will visit Whitworth on Wednesday 15 July 2026.

We Buy Vintage will hold the event at The Ashcroft, Market Street, Whitworth, OL12 8DP, from 10am until 3pm.

Residents are invited to bring unwanted valuables, jewellery and antiques to the roadshow, where the company says items can be converted into same-day cash.

Event details

  • Date: Wednesday 15 July 2026
  • Time: 10am to 3pm
  • Location: The Ashcroft, Market Street, Whitworth, OL12 8DP
  • Organiser: We Buy Vintage

Anyone seeking further information can call 0800 669 6010 or visit the We Buy Vintage website.

Visitors should satisfy themselves that they understand any valuation or sale terms before agreeing to sell an item.
articles.image_alt: Poster for the We Buy Vintage jewellery and antiques roadshow in Whitworth
articles.image_caption: The roadshow will be held at The Ashcroft in Whitworth on Wednesday 15 July.
articles.event_location: The Ashcroft, Market Street, Whitworth, OL12 8DP
